simulations.description: Stores the complete real-time state of a user's DriveFair simulation

simulationId.description: Unique identifier for this simulation session

driverStats.description: Earnings, rating, acceptance rate, and wallet balance

passengerStats.description: Rating, trips count, loyalty points, and total spent

activeTrip.description: Current active trip object, or null

completedTrips.description: List of completed trips with ratings and review tags

pendingPassengerRating.description: A trip waiting for passenger's rating

pendingDriverRating.description: A trip waiting for driver's rating

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last state modification
